parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
actor "Specialist Doctor" as SD
participant ":CreateReportUI" as UI
participant ":CreateReportController" as CTRL
participant ":Company" as COMP
participant ":TestDiagnosis" as TD
participant "obj : diagnosis" as DIAG
participant "rp : TestReportStore" as TRS
participant "rp : TestReport" as TR

activate SD
SD -> UI : 1 asks to create a new diagnosis
activate UI

ref over UI : US4_SD_testsDTO.puml

UI --> SD : 2 requests to choose a given test
deactivate UI

SD -> UI : 3 chooses a given test
activate UI

UI -> CTRL : 4 createTestDiagnosis(idTest)
activate CTRL

CTRL -> COMP : 5 createTestDiagnosis(test)
activate COMP

COMP -> DIAG ** : 6 createTestDiagnosis(testParameterList)

COMP --> CTRL : 7 getDiagnosis()
deactivate COMP

CTRL --> UI : 8 getDiagnosis()
deactivate CTRL

UI --> SD : 9 shows the diagnosis done automatically and requests the data for the report
deactivate UI

SD -> UI : 10 types the requested data
activate UI

UI -> CTRL : 11 createReport(idTest, diagnosis, report)
activate CTRL

CTRL -> COMP : 12 store = getTestReportStore()
activate COMP
deactivate COMP

CTRL -> TRS : 13 createReport(idTest, diagnosis, report)
activate TRS

TRS -> TR ** : 14 create(idTest, diagnosis, report)

TRS --> CTRL : 15 validateReport()
deactivate TRS

CTRL --> UI : 16 shows the typed data and asks for confirmation
deactivate CTRL
deactivate UI

SD -> UI : 17 confirms the data
activate UI

UI -> CTRL : 18 saveReport(report)
activate CTRL

CTRL -> COMP : 19 saveReport(report)
activate COMP

COMP -> TRS : 20 saveReport(report)
activate TRS

TRS -> TRS : 21 validateReport(report)
activate TRS
deactivate TRS

TRS -> TRS : 22 addReport(report)
activate TRS
deactivate TRS

TRS --> COMP
deactivate TRS

COMP --> CTRL
deactivate COMP

CTRL --> UI
deactivate CTRL

UI --> SD : 23 informs operation success
deactivate UI
deactivate SD

@enduml
```
